description: Fixing the last error printed in a CI log, which is usually a cascade from an earlier first failure that remains unaddressed.
body: Failure mode: triage jumps to the final red message in the log and patches it, but that error was a downstream consequence of an earlier failing step, so the pipeline fails again or fails elsewhere. Detection signals: the same job fails after the 'fix'; many errors all trace to one earlier missing artifact/dependency; the last error references something an earlier step should have produced. Do not fix the last error before finding the first. Safer fallback: scroll to the first failing step, fix that root cause, and re-run to confirm the cascade of downstream errors clears.
